steps.t: Jarl Copperbrace is waiting for you outside Ost Galumar. Jarl Copperbrace wishes to speak with you.
Three standard-poles are positioned on the walls of Ost Galumar. Jarl Copperbrace has asked you to raise three of the standards of the Free Peoples ov…
Jarl Copperbrace is outside Ost Galumar. Jarl Copperbrace is waiting to speak with you about your successful errand.
